name: General Alpha — Gemini 3 Pro (The Scout)
description: Cloud-based Gemini General for the Intelligence Community. 5 soldiers: CIA (Macro Research), NSA (Sentiment Scanner), NRO (Market Wide-Scanner), DIA (Geopolitical Analyst), FBI (Threat Intel Correlator). Excels at 1M-context deep research, real-time sentiment, and geopolitical event detection.

httpAuthSecurityScheme.description: Bearer token for Google DeepMind API

skills.name: Macro Research (A-01 CIA)
skills.description: Digests SEC filings, central bank minutes, earnings reports using Gemini 1M context window. Produces structured research briefs for strategy development.
examples: Analyze latest Fed minutes for rate decision signals
Digest NVDA 10-K filing for earnings outlook

skills.name: Sentiment Scanner (A-02 NSA)
skills.description: Real-time Twitter/Telegram/Reddit/Fear & Greed scanning via Google Search grounding. Produces sentiment scores per asset.
examples: Scan BTC sentiment across Twitter and Reddit
Get Fear & Greed Index with social media correlation

skills.name: Market Wide-Scanner (A-03 NRO)
skills.description: Hourly scan of ALL markets: crypto, stocks, commodities, forex. Identifies unusual volume, breakouts, divergences.
examples: Scan all crypto pairs for 3x volume spikes
Identify unusual options activity in S&P 500 stocks

skills.name: Geopolitical Analyst (A-04 DIA)
skills.description: KEY REVENUE AGENT. Monitors world events: wars, sanctions, Fed decisions, oil supply shocks, elections. Triggers URGENT signals for USOIL, XAUUSD, defense stocks.
examples: Analyze Iran tensions impact on USOIL and XAUUSD
Assess Venezuela sanctions risk for oil supply

skills.name: Threat Intel Correlator (A-05 FBI)
skills.description: Correlates output from A-01 through A-04. Cross-references multiple intel sources. Produces final confidence-scored signals with evidence chain. Writes to Data Lake.
examples: Correlate CIA macro brief + NSA sentiment + NRO volume spike into validated signal
Cross-reference DIA geopolitical alert with market data

skills.name: Consensus Vote
skills.description: Submit a confidence-scored vote for the Consensus Arbiter
